title: caesalpinia mollis
intro: Caesalpinia mollis, also known as the velvet tree or velvet-back Caesalpinia, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Caesalpinia mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
